mapper.select: SELECT /*ReviewMapper.selectBestReviewList 우수 사용후기 리스트 */ REVIEW_SEQ , REVIEW_TYPE , REVIEW_TYPE_DTL , CONTRACT_NUM , NOTI_YN , BEST_YN , USE_YN , PRIZE_RNK , REVIEW_CONTENT , SNS_INFO , REGST_NM , REGST_DTTM , ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -3) AS baseDate FROM NMCP_REVIEW_MST WHERE PRIZE_RNK IS NOT NULL AND NOTI_YN = 'Y' AND REVIEW_TYPE = #{reviewType} ORDER BY PRIZE_RNK
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM NMCP_REVIEW_MST /*ReviewMapper.deleteReview 사용후기 삭제 */ WHERE REVIEW_SEQ = #{reviewSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT /*ReviewMapper.selectReviewByReviewSeq 사용후기 조회 */ REVIEW_SEQ , REVIEW_TYPE , REVIEW_TYPE_DTL , CONTRACT_NUM , NOTI_YN , BEST_YN , USE_YN , PRIZE_RNK , REVIEW_CONTENT , SNS_INFO , REGST_NM , REGST_DTTM FROM NMCP_REVIEW_MST WHERE REVIEW_SEQ = #{reviewSeq}
